title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE GENERAL TRIAS ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF GENERAL TRIAS, PROVINCE OF CAVITE, TO PAARALANG PANG-ALAALA KAY DIEGO MOJICA (DIEGO MOJICA MEMORIAL SCHOOL)

chunks.text:
H. NO. 1684 / 84 OG No. 43, 6338 (Oct. 24, 1988)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6673, September 05, 1988 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE GENERAL TRIAS ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF GENERAL TRIAS, PROVINCE OF CAVITE, TO PAARALANG PANG-ALAALA KAY DIEGO MOJICA (DIEGO MOJICA MEMORIAL SCHOOL)

Be it enacted by the Senate and the House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the General Trials Elementary School in the Municipality of General Trias, Province of Cavite, is changed to Paaralang Pang-alaala kay Diego Mojica (Diego Mojica Memorial School).

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

(Sgd.) JOVITO R. SALONGA

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representative was finally passed by the Senate and the House of Representatives on August 12, 1988 and April 28, 1988, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EDWIN P. ACOBA

(Sgd.)

QUIRINO D. ABAD SANTOS, JR.

Acting Secretary of the Senate

Secretary of the

House of Representatives

Approved: September 5, 1988

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
